title: cormus domestica
intro: Cormus domestica, also known as the American dogwood, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Cormus domestica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Cormus domestica is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
